title: taraxacum haraldii
intro: Taraxacum haraldii, also known as the Icelandic dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum haraldii include improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum haraldii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine.
